comments.rich_value:
**Email Message**

---------------------------------------

From: "CCO" (helpdesk@cco.us)
To: reneebusacca@gmail.com
Date: Mon, 23 Mar 2026 16:52:15 -0400
Status: OPENED *(read 14 min later)*
Subject: CCO Academy Login Details

---------------------------------------

Hi Renee Busacca,

We’re thrilled to welcome you to the CCO Academy, our newly launched community platform as of July 4th, 2025! 🎉

CCO ACADEMY

Our new home is hosted on the Circle platform at [www.cco.academy](https://www.cco.academy/). This platform now brings together all of our community activities, discussions, course materials, calendars, Blitzes, and more—all in one place. It’s designed to be mobile-friendly, intuitive, and seamless, so you can focus on learning and engaging without distractions.

CCO Acadamy Platorm Login:

URL: [www.cco.academy](http://www.cco.academy/)
Email: reneebusacca@gmail.com
Initial Password (you may have changed this already - we only provide this initially):RB5593!

CCO EXAM PLATFORM

Our legacy platform ([cco.community](https://cco.community/)) will now be used only for exam access and CEU certificates.

Exam Platform Login Credentials:

URL: [www.cco.community](http://www.cco.community/)
Email: reneebusacca@gmail.com
Username: ReneeB_96011
Password: RB5593!

Important Notes:

Your username—for [cco.community](https://cco.community/)— is fixed and was created to provide anonymity.
Your password must include a special character at the end. Please check carefully when logging in.

CCO SUPPORT

For any billing, technical, or login issues, please reach out to the CCO Academy Help Desk at [https://www.cco.academy/u/b722268f](https://www.cco.academy/u/b722268f) or, if you are a coaching student, in your PS room (Private Support Direct Message) area. Alternative you may use our helpdesk ticketing system at [https://helpdesk.cco.us](https://helpdesk.cco.us/).

We’re excited to have you join us on this new platform and look forward to seeing you thrive in the CCO Academy community!

Warm regards,
The CCO Academy Team.

[![](https://files.podio.com/2446889343/extra_large)](https://files.podio.com/2446889343/extra_large)

----------------------------
# STUDENT TESTS 
----------------------------
[Main Details](#main-contact-details) | [CCO Club Subs](#field-10) | [PTs](#progress-trackers) | [SSH](#student-support-hubs) | [Tests](#student-tests) | [Podio](#podio-information) | [Dupes](#contact-duplicate-information) | [Sales Transactions](#sales-transactions) | [Employee Info](#employee-information)

settings.script:
var Table = ""
var TakenDate = ""
var TotalScore = 0
var AverageScore = 0

Table += "Date | Test Name | Score | Download\n"
Table += "---|---|---|---\n"

for (i=0;i<@[All of [H] Podio Test Results ID Feed](in_150754589_125914549).length;i++){
  TakenDate = moment(@[All of Date Taken](in_125935780_125914549)[i]).format("MM/DD/YYYY")
  TotalScore += @[All of result__percentage](in_125911831_125914549)[i]
  Table += TakenDate+" | "+@[All of test__test_name](in_125911836_125914549)[i]+" | "+@[All of result__percentage](in_125911831_125914549)[i]+"% | "+(@[All of View Results | Students](in_150750509_125914549)[i].split(" ")[0])+"\n"
}

AverageScore = Math.round((TotalScore/@[All of [H] Podio Test Results ID Feed](in_150754589_125914549).length)*100)/100

Table += " | # AVERAGE: |"+AverageScore+"%|"


Table
